title: BDM
description: A blind, deaf, mute mod for multiplayer or singleplayer.
body: A mod where three people are either blind, deaf, or mute. You can change the settings in this mod with the customizable settings. You can also play with more than three people, the roles will be balanced, or if you want to play by yourself, you can do that! Just the role mute, wont be used since it wont do anything at all if playing by self. Simple Voice Chat is needed aslong with Fabric API. (Email me at diegoibarra0902@gmail.com for any questions or bug reports.)
